items.title: blogin init
items.content_text: Scaffold a new site in a directory, with a starter post, layouts, and a blogin.json.
Create a new post file from a title, with front matter filled in and a slug derived from the title.
items.title: blogin new

items.content_text: Render the content tree to static HTML, writing feeds, a sitemap, and the search index alongside the pages.
items.title: blogin build
blogin serve
items.content_text: Build the site and serve it locally, rebuilding when content, layouts, static assets, data files, or the configuration change. A successful rebuild live-reloads the open page in the browser.

items.title: blogin clean
items.content_text: Remove the output directory produced by a build, leaving the content, layouts, and configuration in place.
